response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo is a capable polyglot engineer with roughly 20 years of hands-on software development experience and genuine entrepreneurial instincts via GISCollective, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, demonstrated AI and cloud platform expertise — ideally backed by an advanced degree and recognized industry thought leadership. Her AI exposure only began in April 2025 (MCP tooling and agentic workflow support at re:cinq), with no prior history of building AI products or platforms at scale. Cloud experience is similarly surface-level (AWS CDK in a pricing-team context). There is no evidence of strategic customer advisory work, organizational influence at director scope, or the kind of external AI credibility the role requires.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous engineering career spanning embedded, mobile, web, and infrastructure — satisfies the base 15-year experience threshold
Genuine founder and open-source platform builder (GISCollective, active since 2016) demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and long-term product ownership
Consistent public knowledge-sharing track record: FOSS4G conference talk, multi-day workshops, and community teaching that shows communication and influence capability
concerns: AI expertise is minimal and entirely recent (April 2025 onward); no demonstrated history of building AI-powered products, ML systems, or AI strategy at any organizational level
No cloud platform architecture depth — cloud usage is limited to AWS CDK in a single pricing-team role, far short of the cloud strategy and advisory scope the position requires
Titled 'Senior Software Developer' throughout career with no evidence of director-level scope, strategic partner advising, or cross-organizational technical leadership
